title: Process Engineer Vacancy at GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates!
